name: Marguery Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Over hot (not boiling) water in a double boiler, beat egg yolks with a whisk until fluffy.
2. Very slowly pour melted butter into the yolks, whisking constantly until thick.
3. Add lemon juice, flour, water, paprika, shrimp, crabmeat, and oyster liquor; heat gently.
4. Season to taste.
